Process enroll_course(credits, prereq, seats) -> (enrolled, waitlist)

FSF specification:
if (prereq eq 0) => enrolled eq 0 && waitlist eq 0
if (seats le 0 && credits le 15) => enrolled eq 0 && waitlist eq 1
if (credits ge 12 && seats ge 1) => enrolled eq 1 && waitlist eq 0
if (seats ge 1) => enrolled eq 1 && waitlist eq 0
others => enrolled eq 0 && waitlist eq 0

name: crossing_clear_check

fsfScenarios.test: occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2

promptSpec:
Process crossing_clear_check(occupancy, gate_pos, timer) -> (permit, status)

FSF specification:
if (occupancy gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 2
if (gate_pos gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (timer lt 2) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2) => permit eq 1 && status eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && status eq 0

name: hotel_book

fsfScenarios.test: vip gt 0 && rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0

promptSpec:
Process hotel_book(rooms, nights, vip) -> (booked, rate)

FSF specification:
if (rooms le 0) => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0
if (nights le 0) => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0
if (vip gt 0 && rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0) => booked eq 1 && rate eq 1
if (rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0) => booked eq 1 && rate eq 2
others => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Hotel reservation SOFL application (Liu research applications list)

name: transfer_guard

fsfScenarios.test: amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le daily_left

promptSpec:
Process transfer_guard(balance, amount, daily_left) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (amount gt daily_left) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 3
if (amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le daily_left) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && reason eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Online banking transfer guards (published SOFL modelling case)

name: atm_transfer

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le xfer_cap

promptSpec:
Process atm_transfer(auth, balance, amount, xfer_cap) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 4
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (amount gt xfer_cap) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 3
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le xfer_cap) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && reason eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM/online transfer under auth/balance/cap (Agile-SOFL ATM transfer function; desensitized)

name: library_borrow

fsfScenarios.test: member_ok gt 0 && overdue eq 0 && copies gt 0

promptSpec:
Process library_borrow(member_ok, copies, overdue) -> (loan, deny)

FSF specification:
if (member_ok eq 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 2
if (overdue gt 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (copies le 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (member_ok gt 0 && overdue eq 0 && copies gt 0) => loan eq 1 && deny eq 0
others => loan eq 0 && deny eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Library borrow process (SOFL book industrial teaching case)

name: water_tank_control
promptSpec:
Process water_tank_control(level, inflow, alarm) -> (valve, pump)

FSF specification:
if (alarm gt 0) => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0
if (level ge 9) => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0
if (level le 2) => valve eq 1 && pump eq 1
if (level gt 2 && level lt 9) => valve eq 1 && pump eq 0
others => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0

name: power_trip_protect
promptSpec:
Process power_trip_protect(current, temp, manual) -> (trip, warn)

FSF specification:
if (manual gt 0) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 2
if (current ge 9) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 2
if (temp ge 8) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 1
if (current lt 9 && temp lt 8) => trip eq 0 && warn eq 0
others => trip eq 0 && warn eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Power protection trip priority (industrial control FSF)

name: inventory_reorder
promptSpec:
Process inventory_reorder(stock, reorder_pt, on_order) -> (order, qty)

FSF specification:
if (on_order gt 0) => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
if (stock le reorder_pt) => order eq 1 && qty eq 2
if (stock gt reorder_pt) => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
others => order eq 0 && qty eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Inventory reorder decision (SOFL book / teaching industrial case)
